svg.text: How Hormuz differs from earlier oil and shipping shocks
Rubric severity score from 4J7.4 ranking tables, 0-100. Scores combine exposure, persistence, buffers, route constraint, price response, and freight channels.
Route closures, sanctions rerouting, infrastructure outages, and current Hormuz exposure scenarios are separated below; the score is not a barrel-equivalent loss.
Historical oil supply and allocation shocks
rank 4 | crude oil and petroleum products | conf: medium
rank 13 | crude oil and refined products | conf: medium
rank 14 | crude oil and refined products | conf: medium
rank 15 | light sweet crude oil | conf: high
rank 16 | crude oil, refined products, and refining/logistics | conf: medium
rank 17 | crude oil processing and production capacity | conf: high
Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb shipping disru...
rank 1 | container shipping, tankers, Suez/Bab el-Mandeb trade | conf: high
Tanker War Persian Gulf shipping attacks
rank 2 | oil tanker traffic and war-risk logistics | conf: medium
rank 5 | oil and general maritime logistics | conf: low
rank 7 | oil and petroleum logistics | conf: low
rank 9 | container shipping, port congestion, general maritime trade | conf: low
rank 11 | containerized trade, oil, LNG, LPG, agricultural commodities | conf: high
Same rubric, sorted by product exposure score
Caveat: Current Hormuz rows are exposure/scenario rankings, not observed realized losses. Do not sum product rows; crude, refined products, LPG/NGLs, petrochemicals, fertilizer inputs,
sulphur, aluminium, and freight channels overlap.
Source: data/derived/hormuz_4j7_4_case_ranking_scores.csv and data/derived/hormuz_4j7_4_hormuz_product_ranking_scores.csv; underlying IEA, EIA, World Bank/IMF, UN/industry and project-
derived tables listed in the score files; calculations by author. Accessed 2026-07-06.
Low-conf. labels and hollow markers indicate low-confidence/proxy rows. Dimension cells show 0-4 rubric scores; n/a means the score table did not carry a meaningful value for that dimension.
svg.metadata: Figure ID: fig-4j7-historical-shock-comparison; author/script: scripts/build_4j7_historical_comparison_chart.py; generated from 4J7.4 ranking score tables; unit: normalized severity score 0-100 plus dimension rubric scores 0-4.
